name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: What we're up against
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee
body:
This president is a threat to our democracy.
Peter, I'm on the campaign trail in New Hampshire, and I just spent today talking with a lot of people here about Trump's national emergency declaration. This reckless abuse of power reminds us what we're up against: **This president is a threat to our democracy.**
Everywhere I go, I hear from people who feel like their leadership isn't listening to them. And they're right, he's not. To him, the presidency--and his wall--are a vanity project. We have to fight back.
Our campaign is a community-led effort to fight for what's right. To restore compassion and courage to the White House. This is a fight over our future. It's a fight we have to win, and we can only do it as a movement of people coming together.
**But right now, we need to raise $8,755 or we 'll miss our one-month goal, and we won't have the resources to be out here, connecting, listening and building a team to win. No corporate PACs. No federal lobbyists. No super PAC. Just us--hurry a gift before midnight or we'll fall far short, and we can't keep building if that happens.**
**Here 's the link to donate now: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f97699f/2ae112ef/109ac34a/357ab5df/418441182/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI3NjYtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2766-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")****
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[Click to donate $5.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2766-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")**
**[Click to donate $25.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2766-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2766-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f97699f/2ae112ef/109ac34a/357ab5df/418441182/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI3NjYtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2766-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

Your support is what drives us forward. I wouldn't want to do this any other way than as a team.
Kirsten
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Jess Fassler, kirstengillibrand.com
Date: Thu, Feb 14, 2019
Subject: What we have to do to win
| | | Hey Peter!

When Friday hits, we'll have been in this campaign for a month--and it's been a busy one. Kirsten's already visited Iowa, New Hampshire and, this past weekend, South Carolina.

I want you to know what's happening on these trips. Kirsten's filling rooms, taking all kinds of questions and winning people over. She's doing it on the substance of a really progressive vision, backed by her courage and compassion.

It makes my priorities clear: We have to raise the money to get Kirsten in front of people, whether that's in-person, through organized volunteer networks or online. **I double-checked our month-in goal, and we still need $11,073 to help fund more trips to early states and keep our digital ads up.** This is a community-led campaign--without corporate PACs, federal lobbyists or an individual super PAC. So when we need help, we turn to you.
---
**Will you make a donation right now --before midnight--to help build this community-led campaign and make Kirsten our next president?**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2766-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")
---
| [Donate $25](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2766-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| | [Donate $50](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2766-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---
| [Other](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f97699f/2ae112ef/109ac34a/357ab5df/418441182/VEsP/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI3NjYtZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2766-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
---
If you give tonight, I'd be so grateful. I'm going to stay close to my computer and keep watch on incoming gifts for a little bit so I can give Kirsten an update. Thanks so much.

Jess
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f97699f/2ae112ef/109ac34a/357ab5db/418441182/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://gillibrand.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") | | Paid for by Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee

name: Tina Smith
subject: This is a blatant abuse of the president's power
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Are you with me?

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-february?refcode=rtw_20190215_em-2-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto") Friend, Donald Trump declared a national emergency to secure funding for his wasteful border wall. **This is not an emergency -- this is a blatant abuse of the president 's power. And Trump himself admitted it, saying "I didn't need to do this . . . I just want to [build the wall] faster."** Trump is ignoring our government's checks and balances by sidestepping Congress and repurposing billions of dollars to build a wall that the majority of Americans don't want. I won't stand for these divisive actions and policies -- and I need you fighting with me right now. **[Friend, will you join me in condemning Trump's national emergency and stop his hateful border wall? We need 10,000 signatures by tonight to send a clear message to Trump that his abuse of power won't stand.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4d1be/c1f7015/61585414/11401980/990798569/VEsD/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_201902_emergency-ld?source=rtw_20190215_em-2-ld")** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4d1be/c1f7015/61585414/11401980/990798569/VEsA/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_201902_emergency-ld?source=rtw_20190215_em-2-ld") I believe we should be focusing on the actual urgent challenges facing our nation -- like expanding access to healthcare and taking action to curb gun violence -- instead of Trump's manufactured national emergency. If you're with me, add your name here: **[https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/No-National-Emergency](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4d1be/c1f7015/61585414/11401980/990798569/VEsB/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_201902_emergency-ld?source=rtw_20190215_em-2-ld")** Counting on you in this fight, Tina | **U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-february?refcode=rtw_20190215_em-2-biobox&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4d1be/c1f7015/61585414/11401982/990798569/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: We have to do it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Anything to PROTECT OUR COUNTRY! |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d41961cc9bd69a29cee18a09c0acfb780f60d5337516cd4b890975ba75e2698a582a55b06f4a121dcc1f3612b7357d112a9d7e33450e9958)
---

Friend,

Nancy Pelosi and Democrats have not negotiated in good faith to fund a wall at our Southern Border, proving that obstruction is far more important to them than YOUR SAFETY.

Last week, _**more than 95%**_ of the Patriots I polled demanded a wall. That's because WALLS WORK! I was just in the great city of El Paso, Texas, where illegal traffic has dropped over 90% because of their beautiful wall.

I cannot allow America's safety and security to be put at risk any longer. We need the wall, and I must put _**AMERICA FIRST!**_

Nancy and Democrats have said they will consider filing a legal challenge to ensure the wall is never built, as they continue putting illegal immigrants before Americans. So, we need you to make a HUGE statement to them right now.

I'm setting a goal of raising **$2,OOO,OOO.** I know a goal this big is unprecedented, but we need the American people to make a powerful statement to these Democrats to FINISH THE WALL.

| **[Please make a special contribution by 9 PM EST to show you want to FINISH THE WALL and your donation will be instantly QUADRUPLE-MATCHED.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=4f8c617c254f027e7e6f5417996e279459a3dddea979aeea493db5a0d926a7baadd78172e953e78db2b32cb7d65956b1eaeb744f09335b92)**
**[FINISH THE WALL](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=4f8c617c254f027ed1cdd4e56ac1cf5d53366ce3acb546751cdf27a4ada525594f6c7a64438f491fcbffa60f2454e52249d5af28a9844044) ** **EMAIL: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=4f8c617c254f027e815bd6c0065c94d0f37b1eb0c7bc7c049fd31dee72df1c14a83aebb631a30ec151e8eef4d8de54dc7ae90305c0ee42ab)**
**ACCOUNT NUMBER: 6124335 - 2019
DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT**
**QUADRUPLE MATCH:****UNUSED** ****************************[ **CONTRIBUTE $5 = $25** ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=4f8c617c254f027e90f7d9570f8a97c327ce97f24eb53c222a5d537d01000621cdba58aaf4eb530f7b9d897994fd110906b550424e337893)****************************
[CONTRIBUTE $20 = $100](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=4f8c617c254f027e72c06032de358471c550fca41126d88e9901e2641f20e8900dc49ddfa9d4e7fa710c6d95e337bb1d21c083d23c405c9c) [CONTRIBUTE $15 = $75](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=4f8c617c254f027ed75a232fbcd7c5977d4fa7e9d7542c62bceecc118c5eb4b7b86d11392d43f819ad62bfaff9d4ea0f311b76adda97e419) [CONTRIBUTE $10 = $50](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=4f8c617c254f027e8a656d52c85f8ff60b35073390de8e90b9ea87fa0f53ebc0852894fa6d20367dd8c71c7f190272c96bdb50e64ed0a0e4) [CONTRIBUTE $5 = $25](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=4f8c617c254f027ea37ce7d4574a4ea409462edb5b8f151b850dd792db7ab430609c755494516928f30d76aea877545d959d9021d69d76c6) [CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=4f8c617c254f027e5d7edd1b53ccd4eb0f21d3df21bdb9823fcd9e1985b6a91d453054b769a0c9be587c2c2b56c7a831132128e490ccbd65)
This is one of the most CRITICAL moments in the history of our country. _We MUST finish the job._

The wall will be built. Trust me. When the wall is complete, make sure your name is on the _right side of history, having put Americans before illegal immigrants._

**[Please make a special contribution by 9 PM EST to show you want to FINISH THE WALL and your donation will be instantly QUADRUPLE-MATCHED.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=4f8c617c254f027ed262f6b83a902a79e7b35b97c4f8560b3297a49e6f2ea77debe9d526343272b82858808797897433543da1d24d552f1d)**

Thank you,

[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=4f8c617c254f027e1051d4abed4d432ae889d188e2b481a6283fae61d617f7370256e05b280c196d0f6b9b1c2395e262c9de6c5caf654c36)
Donald J. Trump

[CONTRIBUTE $5 = $25](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=4f8c617c254f027e474d0dacd3f0c8f1ba123f49e8bbd33dfb36e9670f1521e89764324d10a9eed1e353b378b2ee3a0348fac718ff75bd9a)

This is one of the most CRITICAL moments in the history of our country. _We MUST finish the job._

The wall will be built. Trust me. When the wall is complete, make sure your name is on the _right side of history, having put Americans before illegal immigrants._

clean_body: Anything to PROTECT OUR COUNTRY! | | | | | | | | | Friend, Nancy Pelosi and Democrats have not negotiated in good faith to fund a wall at our Southern Border, proving that obstruction is far more important to them than YOUR SAFETY. Last week, more than 95% of the Patriots I polled demanded a wall. That's because WALLS WORK! I was just in the great city of El Paso, Texas, where illegal traffic has dropped over 90% because of their beautiful wall. I cannot allow America's safety and security to be put at risk any longer. We need the wall, and I must put AMERICA FIRST! Nancy and Democrats have said they will consider filing a legal challenge to ensure the wall is never built, as they continue putting illegal immigrants before Americans. So, we need you to make a HUGE statement to them right now. I'm setting a goal of raising $2,OOO,OOO. I know a goal this big is unprecedented, but we need the American people to make a powerful statement to these Democrats to FINISH THE WALL. | EMAIL: ACCOUNT NUMBER: 6124335 - 2019 DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT QUADRUPLE MATCH:UNUSED ************************************************** This is one of the most CRITICAL moments in the history of our country. We MUST finish the job. The wall will be built. Trust me. When the wall is complete, make sure your name is on the right side of history, having put Americans before illegal immigrants. ** Thank you, Donald J. Trump Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee. You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915 We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Trump Make America Great Again Committee and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do! | |

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: some personal news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there,
In 2018, we saw more women run for office than ever before. 11 women were elected to the Senate, and two flipped seats previously held by Republicans - Jacky Rosen in Nevada and Kyrsten Sinema in Arizona.
We should all be proud of this progress, but we know there is much more work to do.
That's why I'm honored and excited to be the new chair of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee's Women's Senate Network so that we can continue to fight for equal representation in Congress.
**To start my tenure, I 'm setting a fundraising goal for the WSN of $10,000 - all to ensure that we have the resources to elect more women. $3 from you would be incredibly meaningful. [Please consider donating $3 or however much you can to help us reach this goal.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc15f/2a380d31/3ac6c7fa/f108a1/1147894439/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0ZHNjYyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTkwMjE2X01XSDREU0NDMV9STyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4dscc?refcode=e20190216_MWH4DSCC1_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee and Maggie Hassan._
**[Click to donate $3.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc15f/2a380d31/3ac6c7fa/f108a2/1147894439/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0ZHNjYyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTkwMjE2X01XSDREU0NDMV9STyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFVRnljbUY1UVNCOWZRPT0iOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4dscc?refcode=e20190216_MWH4DSCC1_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=3")**
**[Click to donate $25.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc15f/2a380d31/3ac6c7fa/f108a3/1147894439/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0ZHNjYyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTkwMjE2X01XSDREU0NDMV9STyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFVRnljbUY1UWlCOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4dscc?refcode=e20190216_MWH4DSCC1_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc15f/2a380d31/3ac6c7fa/f108ac/1147894439/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0ZHNjYyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTkwMjE2X01XSDREU0NDMV9STyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFVRnljbUY1UXlCOWZRPT0iOiI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4dscc?refcode=e20190216_MWH4DSCC1_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc15f/2a380d31/3ac6c7fa/f108a1/1147894439/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0ZHNjYyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTkwMjE2X01XSDREU0NDMV9STyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4dscc?refcode=e20190216_MWH4DSCC1_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
Despite the historic number of women who ran last year, Democrats still lost seats in the Senate. One of the best ways to take these seats back (plus some!) is to make sure that even more women run -- and that more women win - in 2020.
I know firsthand how valuable the Women's Senate Network is. In 2016, they helped me beat the odds and win my race by just over 1,000 votes. With your help, we can be the difference for even more women candidates this cycle.
**We 're going to have some extremely close races in 2020, and your gift could be the difference between winning and losing. [Will you please give $3 or more right now to make sure that Democratic women have the resources to win?](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc15f/2a380d31/3ac6c7fa/f108a1/1147894439/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0ZHNjYyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTkwMjE2X01XSDREU0NDMV9STyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4dscc?refcode=e20190216_MWH4DSCC1_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

> [Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc15f/2a380d31/3ac6c7fa/f108a1/1147894439/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0ZHNjYyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTkwMjE2X01XSDREU0NDMV9STyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4dscc?refcode=e20190216_MWH4DSCC1_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

_ _
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc15f/2a380d31/3ac6c7fa/f108ad/1147894439/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH
Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.
Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

We should all be proud of this progress, but we know there is much more work to do. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Resolute Reads
body:
President Trump on 'Solid Legal Ground' to End the Crisis on our Southern Border | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c869fd5fa2&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [President Trump on 'Solid Legal Ground' to End the Crisis on our Southern Border](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=da095ce16d&e=3ee4985eea)
-_New York Daily News_
“President Trump will have the law on his side when he uses the power of his office to secure the U.S. border with Mexico,” writes former U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia Joseph DiGenova. “The current political reality in Washington ensures that the crisis on our southern border will continue to go unresolved unless the executive branch steps in. Fortunately, both the Constitution and the Congress have placed the authority to do so firmly with the President of the United States.”
---
|
---
| [Where Trump Won: Historic ICE Funding, Triple Wall Miles, Killed ‘Poison Pills’](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e3da1b5a91&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Washington Examiner_
Paul Bedard reports that “Congress approved historic funding levels for Immigration and Customs Enforcement and border patrol, added miles to the border wall, and increased the cap on criminal illegal immigrants that can be jailed. Insiders who worked on the deal said that compared to going along with a spending continuing resolution, the GOP scored several wins.”
---
|
---
| [Wilbur Ross, Ivanka Trump Introduce Workforce Advisory Board](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a14428856d&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Bloomberg_
“The chief executives of Apple Inc., Lockheed Martin Corp. and Walmart Inc., are among 25 prominent Americans who will shape Trump administration efforts to develop job training programs to meet the changing demands of U.S. employers,” Margaret Talev reports. “Ivanka Trump, in a statement, said the board will ‘ensure inclusive growth.’”
---
|
---
| [Boom: Best Economic Optimism in 16 Years, 50% ‘Better Off’ Under Trump](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b24026a4f0&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Washington Examiner_
“Public optimism in their personal economy has hit a 16-year high under President Trump, according to a new survey. Some 69 percent told Gallup that they expect their personal finances to be even better next year,” Paul Bedard reports. “What’s more, the survey company said that 50 percent believe they are ‘better off’ than just a year ago when the current economic surge was kicking in.”
---
|
---
| [Job Openings Hit Record High of 7.3 Million in December](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3cbf371e71&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Washington Examiner_
“The number of job openings hit a record high of 7.3 million in December, the Bureau of Labor Statistics reported Tuesday in a sign of the labor market’s strength,” Joseph Lawler reports. “The construction industry recorded 382,000 new posts, far more than ever before . . . In the past three months, the economy has added an average of 241,000 net new jobs a month.”
---
|
---
| [Trump’s AI Plan Is a Good Start](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=24328a7184&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Bloomberg_
The _Bloomberg_ editorial board writes that President Trump is launching a smart artificial intelligence plan “to ensure the U.S. keeps up in an increasingly crucial industry. By any measure, AI holds immense promise. It’s likely to boost productivity, stimulate demand, encourage innovation, vastly improve consumer products, eliminate waste, and much more.”
---
|
---
| [Trump's Free Market Approach to Drug Pricing Will Help Lower Costs](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=eb67469097&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Hill_
“I agree with the Trump administration’s free market approach” to healthcare, Dr. Marc Siegel writes. “My patients want to know what their medicines cost, even if their insurance ends up covering it. In fact it is ‘price opacity’ that has enabled health costs to soar, while patients are blinded . . . The Trump administration and HHS should be applauded for their efforts to extend and expand price transparency.”
---
|
---
| [High Speed Broadband Is Fostering a New Era of Innovation for Rural America](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ff5840f567&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Agri-Pulse_
“From the first days of his Administration, President Trump has made it a priority to invest in our Nation’s infrastructure and bring prosperity to rural America once again,” White House Deputy Chief of Staff Chris Liddell and White House Deputy Chief Technology Officer Michael Kratsios write. “Agencies are removing regulatory red tape and identifying opportunities for coordination, making it easier for the private sector to invest and build safe and reliable broadband networks to the areas that need access most.”
---
| | |

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d56f343b97&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9d0a9dfbc3&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=5cbb4e5211)
---
| The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Team O'Halleran
subject: they're coming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
The Washington Republicans are going to try and take this seat again, FIRSTNAME(team). They tried last year and failed, but they thing with the president on the ticket, they might have a better chance
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d6323e6/1a8421e1/1983a5425/5a6a1346/660585729/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq12019?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
**" Republicans name 55 House Democrats as 2020 targets" \-- Including Tom** _-Roll Call_ [**Chip in $5 to help us defend Tom >>**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq12019?refcode=em_fr_2019.02.16_b1_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") The Washington Republicans are going to try and take this seat again, team. They tried last year and failed, but they thing with the president on the ticket, they might have a better chance. **Tom has proved over and over that he 's the right person for the job. He's protected our health care, brought good-paying jobs back to our community, and has worked across the aisle ensure our community gets what it needs.** But the GOP needs this seat back, since they'd rather have a rubber-stamp than an independent Arizonan voice in Congress. And the harsh reality is they have the capability to swamp our race with out-of-state special-interest cash to drown out Tom's message. We have to make sure that every voter knows who has their back, and who wants this seat to cut taxes for their wealthy donors -- _while eliminating affordable health care for middle class Arizonans._ [**The choice is clear, we need to keep Tom in Congress. Chip in whatever you can right now to help us prepare for this next challenge.**](http://action.tomohalleran. **_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. clean_body: The Washington Republicans are going to try and take this seat again, FIRSTNAME(team). They tried last year and failed, but they thing with the president on the ticket, they might have a better chance Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first. "" " Republicans name 55 House Democrats as 2020 targets" \-- Including Tom -Roll Call "=" The Washington Republicans are going to try and take this seat again, team. They tried last year and failed, but they thing with the president on the ticket, they might have a better chance. Tom has proved over and over that he 's the right person for the job. He's protected our health care, brought good-paying jobs back to our community, and has worked across the aisle ensure our community gets what it needs. But the GOP needs this seat back, since they'd rather have a rubber-stamp than an independent Arizonan voice in Congress. And the harsh reality is they have the capability to swamp our race with out-of-state special-interest cash to drown out Tom's message. We have to make sure that every voter knows who has their back, and who wants this seat to cut taxes for their wealthy donors -- while eliminating affordable health care for middle class Arizonans. "=" | "=" | "=" | "=" ---|---|--- "=" | "=" | "=" Thank you, Team O'Halleran ** "=" Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please "=". ** Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
